1012 PRTNL_DLYS_DSCHRG_CD PRTNL_DLYS_DSCHRG_CD O0110J3C Other: Peritoneal dialysis (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received peritoneal dialysis in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1013 HOSPC_CARE_14_CD HOSPC_CARE_14_CD O0110K1B Other: Hospice care (14 days) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received hospice care while a resident
